Label: R7
Issue: Does not specify the method for password reset
Correction: The system shall provide a password reset feature accessible via email verification.

Label: R10
Issue: Does not specify the format for alphanumeric characters in passwords
Correction: The password shall contain 6 to 8 alphanumeric characters, including at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.

Label: R13
Issue: Does not specify the method for logging off users after inactivity
Correction: If there is no activity for 10 minutes, the user shall be automatically logged off and redirected to the login page.

Label: R18
Issue: Does not specify the format for recording immunization dates
Correction: A child’s record shall contain the dates that their required immunizations were received in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

Label: R20
Issue: Does not specify the format for recording physical examination dates
Correction: A child’s record shall contain the date of their last physical examination in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

Label: R23
Issue: Does not specify the billing cycle or method of payment
Correction: If only a single child is enrolled, a parent shall be billed $90 at the end of each month via credit card or direct debit.

Label: R26
Issue: Does not specify the format for account history entries
Correction: An account history for each customer shall contain all activity by date in the format YYYY-MM-DD, including transaction type and amount.

Label: R28
Issue: Does not specify the method for calculating late pick-up fees
Correction: Customers shall be billed $10 an hour (per child) for late pick-ups, calculated in 15-minute increments.

Label: R30
Issue: Does not specify the format for customer directory report
Correction: A Customer Directory Report shall list the customers alphabetically by last name and include their address and phone number in a tabular format.

Label: R39
Issue: Does not specify the format for recording user edits
Correction: When a user edits an account, their user ID along with the date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM), and a description of the change shall be recorded in the database.

Label: R41
Issue: Does not specify the format for child’s record information
Correction: The Child’s record shall contain the following information: Name (First Last), Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD), Gender (M/F), Classroom name, Special needs, Photo (JPEG/PNG), Teacher’s comments, Immunization dates (YYYY-MM-DD).

Label: R48
Issue: Does not specify the supported versions of Internet Explorer and Netscape Navigator
Correction: The system shall have a Web-based interface that works with Internet Explorer version 11 and above, and Netscape Navigator version 9 and above.
